'''Havath Minor''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Muunilinst system/Legends|Muunilinst system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] inferior in size to [[Havath Prime]] and was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by 11 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].
